extra.label: Root Cause
extra.value: setup Step 2i staged nothing on keep-defaults; project_feature_gaps detects answered by key presence, so the nudge re-fired every switch

extra.label: Root Cause
extra.value: detect_marker matched a marker only at a stripped line's start, so inline echo/printf >>-appends to session_notes were silently dropped and the statusbar now-pointer stalled

extra.label: Fix
extra.value: tie the marker to a >> redirect into session_notes, decided quote-aware (_tied_notes_append); #499/F1 read-vs-append defense preserved, ReDoS line cap preserved
